    rw [tendsto_atTop_atTop]

    · simp only [hb, le_top, exists_const]
    · push_neg at hb
      obtain ⟨t, ht⟩ := WithTop.ne_top_iff_exists.mp hb
      obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := exists_nat_gt (iSup (fun s : Set.Iic t => ‖X s ω‖))
      use n
      intro m hm
      by_contra h
      push_neg at h
      rw [WithTop.lt_iff_exists_coe] at h
      obtain ⟨s, hs, hst⟩ := h
      rw [← hs] at hst
      have hs_le : s ≤ t := WithTop.coe_le_coe.mp (le_trans (le_of_lt hst) (ht ▸ le_refl _))
      have : n ≤ X s ω := by
        have := hittingAfter_mem_set (i := s) (by rfl : hittingAfter X (Set.Ici ↑m) ⊥ ω = s)
        exact this.1
      have : (n : ℝ) ≤ ‖X s ω‖ := by
        have := this
        simp only [Set.mem_Ici] at this
        exact le_trans (Nat.cast_le.mpr hm) (le_abs_self _ ▸ this)
      have : ‖X s ω‖ ≤ iSup (fun s : Set.Iic t => ‖X s ω‖) := le_ciSup_of_le (f := fun s : Set.Iic t => ‖X s ω‖) ⟨‖X ⊥ ω‖, by simp [Set.mem_range, Subtype.exists]; exact fun _ _ => le_rfl⟩ ⟨s, hs_le⟩ le_rfl
      linarith
